title: Servicialo Organization Configuration
description: Registration record for a node in the Servicialo network. Declares identity, endpoints, and catalog. Equivalent to a DNS zone file.

org_slug.description: Globally unique portable identifier. e.g. clinica-dental-sur

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. e.g. cl, mx, ar

endpoint.description: URLs where this organization's services are reachable. If the org migrates platforms, only this block changes.

mcp.description: MCP server endpoint for AI agent interaction

rest.description: REST API endpoint for HTTP interaction

legal_name.description: Legal or trade name of the organization

tax_id.description: Tax identifier per country (RUT, RFC, CUIT, EIN, etc.)

verticals.description: Service verticals offered: salud, hogar, legal, educacion, belleza, etc.

catalog_url.description: URL to the organization's public service catalog (Servicialo-compatible JSON)

heartbeat_enabled.description: Whether this node sends periodic heartbeats to the resolver

metrics_enabled.description: Whether this node shares anonymized usage metrics
